---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug (REQUIRED)**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Severity (REQUIRED - Select one):**
- [ ] Critical - System down, no workaround
- [ ] High - Major feature broken
- [ ] Medium - Minor feature broken
- [ ] Low - Cosmetic issue

**Environment (REQUIRED):**
- Branch: 
- Commit Hash: 
- Deployment: [Production/Staging/Development]

**To Reproduce (REQUIRED - Exact steps):**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior (REQUIRED):**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior (REQUIRED):**
What actually happened instead.

**Screenshots (REQUIRED unless N/A - explain why not):**
Add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Desktop (Complete if applicable):**
 - OS: [e.g. iOS]
 - Browser: [e.g. chrome, safari]
 - Version: [e.g. 22]

**Smartphone (Complete if applicable):**
 - Device: [e.g. iPhone6]
 - OS: [e.g. iOS8.1]
 - Browser: [e.g. stock browser, safari]
 - Version: [e.g. 22]

**Additional context (Optional):**
Add any other context here.

**CMMI Compliance Checklist (REQUIRED):**
- [ ] I have searched for existing issues
- [ ] I have provided exact reproduction steps
- [ ] I have attached relevant screenshots/logs
- [ ] I have specified branch and commit hash
- [ ] I have assigned a severity level
